depth_block: A2 Targeted Depth Block 4 — Thin-family thickening
assessment: A1 captured all items at material depth. No items were left thin. Item 2 has full 17-person roster. Items 9-16 have structured burdens. Item 18 has no public figures (N/A).

items_9_through_16.title: Franchisee's Obligations
obligations: 25-category obligation table covering site selection, fees, standards compliance, trademarks, products, territory, insurance, advertising, staffing, transfers, renewal, post-termination, non-compete, dispute resolution, guaranty

items_9_through_16.title: Financing
obligations: No financing offered directly or indirectly. No guarantees of franchisee obligations.

items_9_through_16.title: Franchisor's Assistance
restrictions: Must comply with Brand Standards changes
Advertising auto-disapproved if no response in 10 days

items_9_through_16.title: Territory
obligations: Must waive claims re PHLLC competitive activities
restrictions: Cannot sell from other locations without consent
rights: Protected Radius against same concept type
triggers: Failure to provide Adequate Delivery Service → area reduction → possible termination

items_9_through_16.title: Trademarks
obligations: Must use strictly per FA and Brand Standards
restrictions: Cannot demand or prosecute against infringers

items_9_through_16.title: Patents, Copyrights, Proprietary Information
obligations: Must sign Confidentiality/Non-Competition Agreement (owners, equity holders)
Cannot use trade secrets for other purposes
Cannot disclose trade secrets during or after term

items_9_through_16.title: Obligation to Participate
obligations: Must maintain Qualified Operator(s) with ≥10% equity
Daily supervision by qualified manager required
Must designate successor QO within 30 days of death/disability

items_9_through_16.title: Restrictions on Sales
obligations: Must sell ALL standard Approved Products
